title: World Cup 2026 Album Index
description: Enter the country code (e.g., URU, MEX, BRA) and find out which page to stick it on.
goodbyeIndex: Goodbye to flipping through the index like in the 90s!
lessBrowsing: Less browsing 📖 = More years of life for your album 😉
searchPlaceholder: Search by code (MEX), country or page...
noResults: No countries found with that code
sureNotPasted: Are you sure you haven't typed it wrong?
starMessage: Star the repo if this helped you out
shareText: Quickly find which page each sticker goes in your album
kofiMessage: If you liked the site, buy me a coffee to keep adding awesome features 😉
kofiSubMessage: The minimum is just 1 dollar. Yep, cheaper than a pack of stickers 😂.
